title: indigofera stachyodes
intro: Indigofera stachyodes, also known as the Cape starflower or Cape indigo bush, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Indigofera stachyodes include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues. The herbal preparation of the plant is typically made into a tea by infusing the dried leaves in hot water, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
